form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Comes here off a 35-day let-up. Most recently 4th of 12 at this track on March 4 over 1650m, 2 len behind Fivefortwo carrying 61kg at $3.40. The start before that ran on strongly from last on the turn; 4th of 8 at this track on February 4 over 1650m, 2.5 len behind Awesome Fluke carrying 52kg at $2.50. Well placed. Big chance to return to the winner's list.
